title: [ARCHIVED] C418's Melody
description: Addon RP which hooks into other projects such as Legacies and Legends, Wilder Wild and Music and Melody in order to add removed C418 music.
body:
As of 1.20.5, the old obfuscation methods for ogg files, which are required in order to host C418's music in Modrinth and CurseForge projects, no longer work. The only way around this is with a compressed, obfuscated zip file - which cannot be redistributed in mods.

As a result, this project was created as a standalone addon to re-add C418 music formerly used in Legacies and Legends, Wilder Wild and Music and Melody.

In order to use this resouce pack, you must extract only the first zip, and then place the resource pack zip found within into your resource packs folder, as you normally would.

Make sure to place this RP above the resource packs provided by the aforementioned projects.

You may use this project within Modrinth modpacks.
